description: Findings that are valid ONLY when the right chain conditions hold. Each chain has a pattern + required-link conditions. If a finding matches the primary vuln type but no link is present, the report is blocked with CHAIN_REQUIRED.

chains.title: Open redirect + OAuth redirect_uri
chains.description: Open redirect on /oauth/redirect or similar allows stealing OAuth authorization codes. Escalates to full account takeover.

chains.title: SSRF + cloud metadata service
chains.description: SSRF reaching 169.254.169.254 or equivalent cloud metadata endpoint can exfiltrate IAM credentials.

chains.title: SSRF + internal admin panel
chains.description: SSRF reaching an internal admin panel (e.g., unauthenticated Grafana) escalates from informational to RCE/data-exfil.

chains.title: CORS reflection of attacker origin + state-changing endpoint
chains.description: CORS that reflects any origin AND has Access-Control-Allow-Credentials + a state-changing endpoint = cross-origin account takeover.

chains.title: IDOR + sensitive data exposure
chains.description: IDOR on /users/<id> etc. that returns PII, payment data, or tokens escalates from low to critical.

chains.title: Stored XSS + admin viewer
chains.description: Stored XSS on a tenant-visible field that an admin will view = admin account takeover via cookie theft.

chains.title: XSS + CSRF
chains.description: XSS on a logged-in user's context with no CSRF token on a state-changing endpoint = chained CSRF+XSS account takeover.

chains.title: Auth bypass + admin endpoint
chains.description: Auth bypass that reaches an admin endpoint escalates from medium to critical.

chains.title: Race condition + financial endpoint
chains.description: Race condition on /withdraw, /redeem, /transfer, /voucher = direct financial loss.

chains.title: Account enumeration + password reset poisoning
chains.description: Account enumeration on /forgot-password that also returns a reset token timing channel escalates from informational to ATO chain.

chains.title: Info disclosure of internal field names + downstream vuln
chains.description: Internal field names alone are info, but chained with an SQLi, IDOR, or path traversal they materially aid exploitation.

chains.title: Missing rate limit + credential stuffing feasibility
chains.description: Missing rate limit + no lockout / no captcha on /login = credential stuffing feasible at scale.
